creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Bah, please close this.  I see imlib is now up to version 1.6.

I'm going to go back and make a port for 1.6 and update enlightenment as
well (0.14 is in its development stages, but since the present version
doesn't work at all it seems like a devel release is better than a broken
port).

Brett
